title: You're Not Behind (Yet): How to Learn AI in 17 Minutes
description: Most people struggle with AI because they treat it like a gadget, not a thinking partner. In this video, I break down why that happens and walk you through a clear 7-step system to master AI in just 30 days, even if you're starting from complete zero.
